name: node-tfidf
description: Modern, zero-dependency TF-IDF (Term Frequency-Inverse Document Frequency) implementation for Node.js

scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:legacy
scripts.examples: node examples/01-basic-usage.js && node examples/02-document-similarity.js && node examples/03-search-engine.js && node examples/04-advanced-features.js
scripts.lint: eslint lib/ index.js test/ examples/ || true
scripts.lint:fix: eslint lib/ index.js test/ examples/ --fix || true
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run test:all
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run validate && npm run benchmark

author: Van-Duyet Le
